summary: Iter 209 testing — 3 enhancements verified. Backend: 7/7 pytest pass (seed-demo idempotent, by-client thompson_family=4 + chen_family=2 with required fields and desc sort, xplan-sync/log returns 25 entries, push/pull compliance work). Frontend: 2 of 3 features fully working (MyVault meetings 4 cards rendered with tags + Recording badge + count=4; Budget Exposure shows $239.1K total CGT swing, Thompson $86.3K, Chen $133.6K HIGH, all 5 data-testids present, sell-window alerts visible). CRITICAL: XplanSyncHub /xplan-sync-hub 'Sync Log' tab CRASHES with ErrorBoundary on click because backend /api/xplan-sync/xmerge/tokens returns tokens as an OBJECT (dict mapping token name → placeholder) but frontend calls `.slice(0, 12)` on it. Tab renders nothing — hub-sync-log, hub-push-compliance, hub-pull-compliance all missing. Regression: 11/11 routes load OK at first paint (the error only fires after switching to Sync Log tab).

ui_bugs.issue: TypeError: ((intermediate value) || []).slice is not a function — when clicking the 'Sync Log' tab the entire tab crashes via ErrorBoundary. Root cause: data.xmerge_tokens.tokens is an OBJECT (dict) returned by /api/xplan-sync/xmerge/tokens (shape: {"client.fullname":"[entity_name]", ...}) but the code does `(data.xmerge_tokens?.tokens || []).slice(0, 12)`. Object has no .slice method. Result: data-testids hub-sync-log / hub-push-compliance / hub-pull-compliance never render.

action_items: Fix XplanSyncHub.jsx Sync Log tab crash: convert tokens object → array before .slice. Suggested fix at the top of the tab content: `const tokenList = Array.isArray(data.xmerge_tokens?.tokens) ? data.xmerge_tokens.tokens : Object.entries(data.xmerge_tokens?.tokens || {}).map(([k,v])=>({name:k, placeholder:v}));` then use tokenList.slice(0,12). Alternatively normalize on the backend to return tokens as a list. After fix, validate that hub-sync-log, hub-push-compliance, hub-pull-compliance render, the audit log shows 25+ events from /api/xplan-sync/log, and Push/Pull buttons fire toasts + refresh the log.
critical_code_review_comments: XplanSyncHub.jsx assumes xmerge_tokens.tokens is an array (.slice / .map / .length) but the backend returns a plain object map. This is an API contract mismatch — either fix frontend or change backend response shape. Either way, defensive code (Array.isArray check) should be added before .slice().
Same file at lines 374, 376, 384, 385 repeats the same dangerous `(data.xmerge_tokens?.tokens || []).slice/.map/.length` pattern — DRY this into a useMemo'd `tokenList` constant.

Audit log entries don't have data-testid='hub-event-{i}' visible until the tab actually renders (blocked by the slice crash). Once fixed, the 25 entries should render with the existing per-row data-testids.
test_credentials: No login. LocalStorage: wealth_command_compliance_v5='permanent'. For /my-vault: app_mode='client' + selected_client='{"id":"thompson_family"}'. For everything else: app_mode='adviser'.
seed_data_creation: Backend POST /api/meetings/seed-demo inserted 6 meeting notes (4 thompson_family + 2 chen_family) on first call; subsequent calls insert 0 (idempotent confirmed). Total meetings collection now has >=6 docs.
context_for_next_testing_agent: ALL 3 ENHANCEMENTS verified except for one critical frontend bug. (1) Backend meetings API and seed-demo idempotency PASS. (2) MyVault Meeting Notes tab fully renders 4 thompson cards with title/tags(capitalized)/summary/attendees/date/Recording badge. vault-meetings-count='4'. (3) Budget Exposure sell-window alerts tile visible with both rows (Thompson $86.3K, Chen $133.6K HIGH), bulk-outreach-btn + all 4 email/ics data-testids present, Total CGT Swing KPI = $239.1K. (4) XplanSyncHub 'Sync Log' tab — data-testid='hub-tab-synclog' EXISTS on the tabs row, but clicking it triggers ErrorBoundary due to .slice on an object (see action_items). After main agent fix, re-verify hub-sync-log/hub-push-compliance/hub-pull-compliance + Push/Pull → toast + audit log refresh.
rca of the issue: Reproduction: 1) localStorage set wealth_command_compliance_v5='permanent', app_mode='adviser'. 2) Visit /xplan-sync-hub. 3) Click [data-testid='hub-tab-synclog']. 4) Observe ErrorBoundary fallback ('Application TypeError ... .slice is not a function'). RCA: backend GET /api/xplan-sync/xmerge/tokens returns shape {mode:'mock', tokens:{ 'client.fullname':'[entity_name]', ... }} — tokens is an OBJECT. XplanSyncHub.jsx line 374 calls `(data.xmerge_tokens?.tokens || []).slice(0, 12)` which throws because Object has no .slice method. The whole tab panel is wrapped in one component so the entire tab dies. Mitigation: (a) Frontend — normalize tokens to an array via Object.entries before consumption; (b) Backend — change response to return tokens as `[{name, placeholder}]`. Frontend fix is lower risk and isolated.
